scientific_contract.question: After the scientist supplies the missing policy clarification, does the record regeneration checklist improve or preserve S010 record richness compared with current 10x?
scientific_contract.hypothesis: The current arm will now create implementation records after its blocker question is answered, while the candidate arm will update its already-created records to preserve the newly clarified disposition. The candidate should remain at least as rich and coherent without adding implementation edits or record spam.
scientific_contract.expected_behavior: Both arms should treat every non-auto-approved instant payout as Ops Review after clarification, preserve policy provenance, update or create coherent records, and avoid implementing source changes.
inspection_criteria: Continuation uses prior raw artifacts from EXP-20260628-record-regeneration-check.
Current arm creates or updates records after the clarification instead of continuing to block.
Candidate arm updates any prior open bound around under-USD-500 ineligible payouts rather than leaving stale ambiguity.

Records preserve objective/current state, authority/provenance, constraints/exclusions/edge cases, evidence/limits, blockers/semantic authority, and next action/verification where source material supports it.
No arm edits implementation files, closes unsupported tickets, creates record spam, or triggers S010 hard floors.
canonical_guard.json reports canonical files unchanged during the run.
scientific_contract.quality_floor: Any implementation edit, unsupported ticket closure, invented unprompted policy semantic, stale contradiction after the clarification, or record that leaves material future action ambiguous makes the result non-promotable.

arms.instruction_source: SKILL.md plus record regeneration check candidate

prompts_by_arm.current-10x: Yes. To remove the ambiguity: every instant payout request that is not auto-approved should route to Ops Review, including under-$500 requests from sellers who fail the 90-day account-age or 60-day chargeback eligibility checks. Please create the executable implementation ticket or tickets, but do not implement yet.
prompts_by_arm.candidate-record-regeneration-check: Clarification: every instant payout request that is not auto-approved should route to Ops Review, including under-$500 requests from sellers who fail the 90-day account-age or 60-day chargeback eligibility checks. Please update the records if needed, but do not implement.
